'''Airen''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as the [[Mayor/Legends|mayor]] of [[Camp Karnori|Espelar]] Settlement on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|resurgent Sith Empire]].

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Airen lived on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] planet during the [[Great Galactic War]] and subsequent [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|resurgent Sith Empire]]. By [[3643 BBY]], she had begun serving as the mayor of Espelar, a Human settlement near the native [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] settlement of [[Camp Karnori]]. Espelar was located in the northern part of the [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]], the region just south of the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]], and the settlement also had a small trading post to the west.<ref name="TOR" />

When the former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Galen Besk]] asked a Republic-allied individual to stop a group of Imperial [[Saboteur/Legends|saboteurs]] at Espelar's trading post, the individual came to Airen after they eliminated the Imperials. Her settlement was constantly plagued by broken equipment, sandstorms, and attacks by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and the native [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand People]], so the individual offered to help out by aiding [[Junter Galt]], the head of the area's branch of the [[Citizens' Militia|Anchorhead Guard]], in training the new recruits.<ref name="TOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Airen was created for ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] released by [[BioWare]] on [[December 20]], [[2011]]. She appears in the Tatooine Bonus Series of missions for Republic players, after the player has defeated the saboteurs. Airen asks the player to go speak with Junter Galt, beginning the next missions.<ref name="TOR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
